revision.comment:
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '　三吉神社（みよしじんじゃ）とは、札幌市中央区南壱條西八丁目にある神社である。
　明治壱拾壱年に秋田県の太...'
revision.text:
三吉神社（みよしじんじゃ）とは、札幌市中央区南壱條西八丁目にある神社である。
　明治壱拾壱年に秋田県の太平山三吉神社の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。明治壱拾弐年に現在地に奉遷、その後昭和五年には縣社に昇格している。現在の祭神は、大巳貴神、小彦名神、藤原三吉神、金刀比羅宮、天満宮である。
　札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年五月壱拾五日の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大にとり行われる。

revision.comment: ページ [[三吉神社（札幌市）]] を [[三吉神社 (札幌市)]] へ移動: [[WP:NC]]違反
revision.text:
三吉神社（みよしじんじゃ）とは、札幌市中央区南壱條西八丁目にある神社である。
　明治壱拾壱年に秋田県の太平山三吉神社の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。明治壱拾弐年に現在地に奉遷、その後昭和五年には縣社に昇格している。現在の祭神は、大巳貴神、小彦名神、藤原三吉神、金刀比羅宮、天満宮である。
　札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年五月壱拾五日の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大にとり行われる。

'''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]]南1条西8丁目にある神社である。
明治11年に[[秋田県]]の太平山三吉神社の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。明治12年に現在地に奉遷、その後昭和5年には縣社に昇格している。現在の祭神は、大巳貴神、小彦名神、藤原三吉神、金刀比羅宮、[[天満宮]]である。
札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大にとり行われる。
{{shinto-stub}} [[Category:中央区 (札幌市)|みよししんしや]]

明治11年に[[秋田県]]の太平山三吉神社の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。明治12年に現在地に奉遷、その後昭和5年には縣社に昇格している。現在の祭神は、大巳貴神、小彦名神、藤原三吉神、金刀比羅宮、[[天満宮]]である。

天満宮| 創建=[[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）| 本殿=切妻造| 社格=県社| 例祭=5月15日| 別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]]南1条西8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879年]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930年]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主|大巳貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]]

[[天満宮]] |創建=[[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年） |本殿=切妻造 |社格=旧[[県社]] |例祭=5月15日 |別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]][[南○条西 (札幌市)|南1条西]]8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879年]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930年]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主|大己貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == 外部リンク == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ 札幌三吉神社] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{DEFAULTSORT:みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:三吉神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:金刀比羅神社]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}}

[[天満宮]] |創建=[[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年） |本殿=切妻造 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type=旧[[県社]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival=5月15日 |別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]][[南○条西 (札幌市)|南1条西]]8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879年]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930年]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主|大己貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == 外部リンク == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ 札幌三吉神社] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{citation needed:みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:qq]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}}[[Category:Pages needing attribution]]

[[天満宮]] |創建=[[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年） |本殿=切妻造 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type=旧[[県社]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival=5月15日 |別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]][[南○条西 (札幌市)|南1条西]]8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879年]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930年]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} *[[大国主|大己貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == 外部リンク == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ 札幌三吉神社] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{citation needed|みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:getting the categories and imported pages jawiki linked]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:qq]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}} [[Category:Pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]]

[[天満宮]] |創建=[[1878]]（[[明治]]11年） |本殿=切妻造 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|type=旧[[県社]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|festival=5月15日 |別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]][[南○条西 (札幌市)|南1条西]]8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} *[[大国主|大己貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ 札幌三吉神社] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{citation needed|みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira shrines]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:11]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:11]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]][[Category:11]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}} [[Category:Pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]][[Category:11]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[Category:New]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)}}

{{Shrine |name=Miyoshi Shrine |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}}|image=[[File:Miyoshi Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|270px]]
Haiden |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}}|location={{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道}}{{ill|Sapporo|ja|札幌市}}{{ill|Chuo Ward (Sapporo)|ja|中央区 (札幌市)|lt=Chuo Ward|lt_ja=中央区}} Minami 1-jo Nishi 8-chome 17 |latitude_deg=43 |latitude_min=3 |latitude_sec=30.4 |N/S = N |longitude_deg=141 |longitude_min=20 |longitude_sec=42.6 |E/W = E |map_country_code=JP |map=Sapporo2 |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}}|deity={{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴神}}
{{ill|Sukunahikona|ja|少彦名神}}
Fujiwara Miyoshi God
{{ill|Kotohira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅宮}}
{{ill|Tenmangu Shrine|ja|天満宮}} |founded={{ill|1878|ja|1878}} ({{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 11) |main_hall=Gabled-roof style (kirizuma-zukuri) |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}}|type=Former Prefectural Shrine |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|ja|神道}}|festival={{ill|May 15|ja|5月15日}} |alias= }} '''Miyoshi Shrine''' (三吉神社) is a Shinto shrine located in 8-chome of Minami 1-jo Nishi, Chuo Ward, {{ill|Sapporo|ja|札幌市}} in {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道}}. Its former shrine rank under the modern shrine ranking system, {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Former Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格}}, was that of a Prefectural Shrine. The shrine’s origin dates back to {{ill|1878|ja|1878}} (the 11th year of the {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社}} of {{ill|Akita Prefecture|ja|秋田県}} was enshrined. In {{ill|1879|ja|1879}} (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in {{ill|1930|ja|1930}} (the 5th year of the {{ill|Showa|ja|昭和}} era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on {{ill|May 15|ja|5月15日}} is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴神}} * {{ill|Sukunahikona|ja|スクナビコナ|lt=Sukunahikona|lt_ja=少彦名神}} * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * {{ill|Kotohira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅宮}} * {{ill|Tenmangu Shrine|ja|天満宮}} == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{citation needed|Miyoshi Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:translated pages]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} [[Category:Pages of Uncertain Originality]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[Category:New]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]]

Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on {{ill|May 15|ja|5月15日}} is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴神}} * {{ill|Sukunahikona|ja|スクナビコナ|lt=Sukunahikona|lt_ja=少彦名神}} * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * {{ill|Kotohira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅宮}} * {{ill|Tenmangu Shrine|ja|天満宮}} == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{citation needed|Miyoshi Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:translated pages]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:11]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} [[Category:Pages of Uncertain Originality]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[Category:11]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[Category:New]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:500 shortest pages as of 03-29-2025]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]]

Its former shrine rank under the modern shrine ranking system, {{ill|Modern Shrine Ranking System|ja|近代社格制度|lt=Former Shrine Rank|lt_ja=旧社格|12=draft}}, was that of a Prefectural Shrine. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on {{ill|May 15|ja|5月15日|12=draft}} is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=draft}}}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴神|12=draft}} * {{ill|Sukunahikona|ja|スクナビコナ|lt=Sukunahikona|lt_ja=少彦名神|12=draft}} * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * {{ill|Kotohira Shrine|ja|金刀比羅宮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenmangu Shrine|ja|天満宮|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{citation needed|Miyoshi Shrine}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Pages of Uncertain Originality]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]]

{{神社 |名称=三吉神社 |画像=[[File:Miyoshi Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地=[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]]南1条西8丁目17番地 | 緯度度 = 43 | 緯度分 = 3 | 緯度秒 = 30.4 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 141 |経度分 = 20 | 経度秒 = 42.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |地図=Sapporo2 |祭神=[[大己貴神]]
[[少彦名神]]
藤原三吉神
[[金刀比羅宮]]
[[天満宮]] |創建=[[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年） |本殿=切妻造 |社格=旧[[県社]] |例祭=5月15日 |別名= }} '''三吉神社'''（みよしじんじゃ）とは、[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[中央区 (札幌市)|中央区]][[南○条西 (札幌市)|南1条西]]8丁目にある神社である。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は県社。 [[1878年]]（[[明治]]11年）に[[秋田県]]の[[太平山三吉神社]]の分霊を祀ったのが始まりである。[[1879年]]（明治12年）に現在地に奉遷、その後[[1930年]]（[[昭和]]5年）には縣社に昇格している。 札幌市中心部に鎮座していることから、多くの市民に親しまれ毎年[[5月15日]]の例大祭も市内他社と比較し盛大に執り行われる。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主|大己貴神]] *[[スクナビコナ|少彦名神]] *藤原三吉神 *[[金刀比羅宮]] *[[天満宮]] == 外部リンク == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ 札幌三吉神社] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html 三吉神社]（北海道神社庁サイト） {{DEFAULTSORT:みよししんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:三吉神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:金刀比羅神社]] [[Category:北海道の旧県社]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の建築物]] [[Category:札幌市中央区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}}

Its former shrine Rank under the modern shrine Ranking system, [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Former Shrine Rank]], was that of a Prefectural Shrine. The shrine’s origin dates back to {{ill|1878|ja|1878|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1878|qq=}} (the 11th year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]] was enshrined. In {{ill|1879|ja|1879|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1879|qq=}} (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in {{ill|1930|ja|1930|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1930|qq=}} (the 5th year of the [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on [[:en:May 15|May 15]] is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] * [[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]] * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]] * [[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Tenjin Shrines]] [[Category:Kotohira Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Buildings in Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]]

The shrine’s origin dates back to [[:en:1878|1878]] (the 11th year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]] was enshrined. In [[:en:1879|1879]] (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in [[:en:1930|1930]] (the 5th year of the [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on [[:en:May 15|May 15]] is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] * [[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]] * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]] * [[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Miyoshi Shrine (Sapporo City)]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11354610]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:17, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Miyoshi Shrine |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image=File:Miyoshi Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location=[[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]][[:en:Sapporo|Sapporo]][[:en:Chūō-ku, Sapporo|Chuo Ward]] Minami 1-jo Nishi 8-chome 17 |latitude_deg=43 |latitude_min=3 |latitude_sec=30.4 |N/S = N |longitude_deg=141 |longitude_min=20 |longitude_sec=42.6 |E/W = E |map_country_code=JP |map=Sapporo2 |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity={{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|lt=Sukunabikona|lt=Sukunahikona|ja|少彦名神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunahikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}
Fujiwara Miyoshi God
[[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]]
[[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] |founded=[[:en:1878|1878]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 11) |main_hall=Gabled-roof style (kirizuma-zukuri) |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type=Former Prefectural Shrine |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival=[[:en:May 15|May 15]] |alias= |prefecture={{ill|Sapporo|qid=Q37951}} |coordinates={{Coord|43.058444|N|141.345167|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Miyoshi Shrine''' (三吉神社) is a Shinto shrine located in 8-chome of Minami 1-jo Nishi, Chuo Ward, [[:en:Sapporo|Sapporo]] in [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]]. Its former shrine Rank under the modern shrine Ranking system, [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Former Shrine Rank]], was that of a Prefectural Shrine. The shrine’s origin dates back to [[:en:1878|1878]] (the 11th year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]] was enshrined. In [[:en:1879|1879]] (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in [[:en:1930|1930]] (the 5th year of the [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on [[:en:May 15|May 15]] is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] * [[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]] * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]] * [[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] {{wikidata link|Q11354610}}

[[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11354610]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:17, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name=Miyoshi Shrine |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|image=File:Miyoshi Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|location=[[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]][[:en:Sapporo|Sapporo]][[:en:Chūō-ku, Sapporo|Chuo Ward]] Minami 1-jo Nishi 8-chome 17 |latitude_deg=43 |latitude_min=3 |latitude_sec=30.4 |N/S = N |longitude_deg=141 |longitude_min=20 |longitude_sec=42.6 |E/W = E |map_country_code=JP |map=Sapporo2 |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|deity={{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|lt=Sukunabikona|lt=Sukunahikona|ja|少彦名神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunahikona|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}
Fujiwara Miyoshi God
[[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]]
[[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] |founded=[[:en:1878|1878]] ([[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 11) |main_hall=Gabled-roof style (kirizuma-zukuri) |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|type=Former Prefectural Shrine |religious_affiliation=[[:en:Shinto|Shinto]]|festival=[[:en:May 15|May 15]] |alias= |prefecture={{ill|Sapporo|WD=Q37951}} |coordinates={{Coord|43.058444|N|141.345167|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Miyoshi Shrine''' (三吉神社) is a Shinto shrine located in 8-chome of Minami 1-jo Nishi, Chuo Ward, [[:en:Sapporo|Sapporo]] in [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]]. Its former shrine Rank under the modern shrine Ranking system, [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Former Shrine Rank]], was that of a Prefectural Shrine. The shrine’s origin dates back to [[:en:1878|1878]] (the 11th year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]] was enshrined. In [[:en:1879|1879]] (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in [[:en:1930|1930]] (the 5th year of the [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on [[:en:May 15|May 15]] is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] * [[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]] * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]] * [[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11354610}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

The shrine’s origin dates back to [[:en:1878|1878]] (the 11th year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]] was enshrined. In [[:en:1879|1879]] (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in [[:en:1930|1930]] (the 5th year of the [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa]] era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on [[:en:May 15|May 15]] is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Ōkuninushi]] * [[:en:Sukunabikona|Sukunahikona]] * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * [[:en:Kotohira-gū|Kotohira Shrine]] * [[:en:Tenmangū|Choraku-ji Tenmangū]] == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11354610}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

{{ill|Tenmangū|en|Tenmangū|WD=Q798838|lt=Choraku-ji Tenmangū}} |founded={{ill|1878|en|1878|WD=Q7776|lt=1878}} ({{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 11) |main_hall=Gabled-roof style (kirizuma-zukuri) |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|type=Former Prefectural Shrine |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|festival={{ill|May 15|en|May 15|WD=Q2562|lt=May 15}} |alias= |prefecture={{ill|Sapporo|WD=Q37951}} |coordinates={{Coord|43.058444|N|141.345167|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Miyoshi Shrine''' (三吉神社) is a Shinto shrine located in 8-chome of Minami 1-jo Nishi, Chuo Ward, {{ill|Sapporo|en|Sapporo|WD=Q37951|lt=Sapporo}} in {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|WD=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido}}. Its former shrine Rank under the modern shrine Ranking system, {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534|lt=Former Shrine Rank}}, was that of a Prefectural Shrine. The shrine’s origin dates back to {{ill|1878|en|1878|WD=Q7776|lt=1878}} (the 11th year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} era), when a branch spirit of the {{ill|Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|ja|太平山三吉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheizan Miyoshi Shrine|qq=}} of {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|WD=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture}} was enshrined. In {{ill|1879|en|1879|WD=Q7783|lt=1879}} (the 12th year of the Meiji era) the shrine was relocated to its present site, and in {{ill|1930|en|1930|WD=Q18787|lt=1930}} (the 5th year of the {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|WD=Q327567|lt=Showa}} era) it was elevated to Prefectural Shrine status. Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|WD=Q2562|lt=May 15}} is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|en|Sukunabikona|WD=Q3275687|lt=Sukunahikona}} * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * {{ill|Kotohira-gū|en|Kotohira-gū|WD=Q94760|lt=Kotohira Shrine}} * {{ill|Tenmangū|en|Tenmangū|WD=Q798838|lt=Choraku-ji Tenmangū}} == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11354610}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Due to its central location within Sapporo, the shrine is well loved by the local citizens, and its annual festival on {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|WD=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}} is celebrated in grand scale compared to other shrines in the city. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|en|Sukunabikona|WD=Q3275687|lt=Sukunahikona|1=Sukunabikona}} * Fujiwara Miyoshi God * {{ill|Kotohira-gū|en|Kotohira-gū|WD=Q94760|lt=Kotohira Shrine|1=Kotohira-gū}} * {{ill|Tenmangū|en|Tenmangū|WD=Q798838|lt=Choraku-ji Tenmangū|1=Tenmangū}} == External Links == * [https://miyoshi-sapporo.or.jp/ Sapporo Miyoshi Shrine] * [http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/01/01002.html Miyoshi Shrine] (Hokkaido Shrine Association website) {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|三吉神社 (札幌市)|version=96622513|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:三吉神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11354610}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Chūō-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Chuo Ward, Sapporo City]] [[Category:Miyoshi Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Tenjin (kami)]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages]]
